textPlain: This is a very cool experiment, even if the board doesn't end up being that practical (the antenna  hack is going to be an ongoing issue I think) your documentation looks great at a glance!
If it is a little bigger to incorporate a bigger chip antenna and some GPIO pins, it is going to be very useful for a lot of IoT projects!!
> This can be seen in my highly necessary depiction below.I love this. Fun and insightful article. Thank you.
Thank you! I agree, antenna definitely needs some improvement.
there is plenty of those already and not all too hard to make yourself, see LilyGo T01-C3Its of format of original ESP8 so you get serial + 3 IO pins
Definitely would be more functional with more of the GPIOs exposed.
